meta.title: Aniko — Software Developer & AI Enthusiast
meta.description: Portfolio of Aniko, a software developer building AI-powered products, educational platforms and Telegram bots.

hero.name: Alijon Sattorqulov
hero.description: I design and build AI-powered products, educational platforms and automation tools — from React interfaces to Python backends, based in Uzbekistan.

about.title: A little about my work
about.intro: I'm a developer working across the stack — mostly React on the frontend and Python on the backend — with a growing focus on applying AI to real products, from educational platforms to conversational bots. I'm currently pursuing a master's degree while building and shipping projects, both independently and through freelance work.

timeline.title: C# & OOP
timeline.description: Started with C# and object-oriented programming fundamentals before moving into modern web development.

timeline.title: React + Python
timeline.description: Built fluency across React-based frontends and Python backends, working on real client and personal projects.

timeline.title: AI-powered platforms
timeline.description: Began building AI-driven products — an educational platform that turns prompts into animated lessons, and multi-mode AI Telegram bots.

timeline.title: Freelance & Master's
timeline.description: Freelancing through DoWork while pursuing a master's degree, working in both Uzbek and English.

skills.title: What I work with
skills.description: Tools and technologies I use to design, build and ship products end to end.

experience.title: Where I've worked
experience.description: A timeline of freelance and independent work.

items.description: Building client projects through the DoWork freelance platform, including a multi-mode AI Telegram bot in Python using python-telegram-bot and the Anthropic and Groq APIs.

Originated and led an AI-powered animated educational platform that turns prompts into interactive lessons, directing a team of four developers across a React + Claude API frontend and a FastAPI backend.
Building a multi-role educational SaaS platform with a Uzbek-language interface, covering design tokens, authentication flows and reusable components with Vite + React.
Pursuing a master's degree alongside freelance and personal project work.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.description: A mix of freelance client work, a startup I lead, and personal experiments.

items.title: Zyniq
items.description: An AI-powered animated educational platform that converts prompts into interactive lessons. Led as founder and PM, directing a four-person team from concept to MVP.

items.title: AcademiXAI
items.description: A multi-role educational SaaS platform (student, teacher, admin) with a Uzbek-language UI, built with Vite and React.

items.title: DoWork AI Telegram Bot
items.description: A multi-mode AI Telegram bot built for a freelance client, combining the Anthropic and Groq APIs with local SQLite storage.

items.title: Jarvis Desktop Assistant
items.description: A Python-based voice and text assistant for Windows, powered by the Gemini API, with startup integration and custom command routing.

items.title: Sneakers Store
items.description: A Frontend Mentor e-commerce challenge with an animated cart dropdown, routed pages and a deployed SPA build.

services.title: How I can help
services.description: Focused services for teams and founders who need product built, not just designed.

items.title: Website Development
items.description: Fast, responsive websites and web apps built with React and modern tooling.

items.title: Telegram Bots
items.description: Custom Telegram bots with AI integrations, persistent storage and multi-mode conversations.

items.title: Backend APIs
items.description: Reliable Python backends and APIs to power web and bot products.

items.title: AI Integration
items.description: Adding AI features to existing products, from chat interfaces to content generation.

items.title: UI Development
items.description: Clean, accessible interfaces translated from design into production-ready React.

items.title: Automation
items.description: Scripts and tools that remove repetitive manual work from a workflow.

certificates.title: Certificates & achievements
certificates.description: A record of courses, competitions and milestones.

items.title: Object-Oriented Programming with C#
items.description: Core coverage of classes, inheritance, interfaces and OOP design patterns using C#.

items.title: Advanced English Proficiency
items.description: Certification of professional working proficiency in written and spoken English.

items.title: Tech Study Group Hackathon

items.title: AcademiXAI Milestone
items.description: Reached a major frontend milestone: full auth flow, design tokens and mock API layer.

gallery.title: Moments

items.title: Turning a study-group idea into an MVP
items.excerpt: How Zyniq went from a whiteboard concept to a working AI-powered lesson generator with a four-person team.

items.title: Building a multi-mode Telegram bot in Python

items.title: Freelancing while studying: what actually works

items.name: Client, DoWork
items.comment: Delivered the Telegram bot exactly to spec, including the trickier multi-provider AI logic, and communicated clearly the whole way through.

items.name: Teammate
items.comment: Great at breaking down an ambitious idea into something a small team could actually ship on time.

items.name: Study Group Peer
items.comment: Always the one pushing our group projects from idea to something real and demo-able.
